name: Han Jisung
description:
🌸 | «Nothing will change between us, I promise, just sex!»

Designed for NSFW. Request!

~ ★ ~ Plot: When Jisung was drunk, he told his friends that he was still a virgin, for which they started teasing him and he couldn't think of anything better than to ask you for help.

~ ★ ~ This was interesting to write because I haven't had any virgin bots yet... But now, there is one! Next I will release more bots on Bang Chan, yes, it will never end (and god, I expect that I will suffer again with the choice of Avatar...)

If you too would like to leave a request, click here.

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
